settings.heading: FAQs: Your Guide to CC Double O

settings.text: This guide is here to ensure your experience is as smooth and stylish as our designs.

settings.heading: My Account
settings.content:
How do I create an account?
We'd love for you to join the CC Double O community. Create your personal CC Double O account with just your name, email, and a password to get started. For an even easier experience, you can also register and log in with your Facebook or Google account. Your account is your key to a faster checkout, easy order tracking, and exclusive member-only perks.

How can I update my personal information?
To update your details, just log in to your account and go to your profile settings. If you forget your password, click on the "Forgot Your Password?" link on the login page. We'll send you a secure email to guide you through the reset process.

What if I'm having trouble with the website?
For the best browsing experience, we recommend enabling cookies and JavaScript. If you run into any technical issues, our Customer Service team is here to help. You can reach us at (+66) 2118 2000 or email us at customerservice@jaspal.co.th.

settings.heading: Orders & Shipping
settings.content:
How can I track my order?
The journey of your new CC Double O pieces is something to look forward to. You can follow their path to you in a few ways:
• Visit the "My Orders" section in your account.
• Click the tracking number in your shipment confirmation email.
• Track your parcel directly on the website with your order number: https://ecom-ccdoubleo.myshopify.com/apps/order-tracking

What are the shipping times and costs?
We offer standard delivery within Thailand for a fee of 60 THB. Your order will be prepared within 48 hours of confirmation and dispatched on a business day, so it arrives at your doorstep promptly.

Do you ship internationally?
Yes, CC Double O extends its style to our international community through our global shipping partner, DHL. Please note that items shipped internationally are final sale and are not eligible for return or exchange.

Will I be responsible for customs or import duties?
For our international customers, your order may be subject to local import duties and taxes. Your local customs authority determines these charges, which are the responsibility of the recipient.

Can I modify or cancel my order after it has been placed?
Once an order is confirmed, it's immediately sent for processing to ensure a swift delivery. Because of this, we are unable to change or cancel orders after they have been confirmed. If your selection isn't the perfect fit, our domestic return policy is available to you.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchanges
settings.content:
What is your return and exchange policy?
Your satisfaction is our priority. For orders within Thailand, we accept returns within 14 days of receipt. We ask that items are returned in their original, unworn condition with all tags attached. For hygiene reasons, cosmetics and perfumes must be in their original, unopened packaging. Jewelry, headbands, swimwear, bodysuits, and intimates cannot be exchanged or returned. Items from our "End of Season" sales and any purchases made using online credit are final.

How do I arrange a return or exchange?
We've designed a simple process for you:
• Online Returns: Log in to your account and start the process under "My Orders." If you checked out as a guest, you can use your order number and email to access the return form. Once your request is approved, you have 7 days to send the item back to us.
• In-Store Exchanges: You are welcome to visit any CC Double O store within 14 days. Please bring the item and your Delivery Order (D/O) documents, and our in-store style advisors will be happy to help you with an exchange.

When can I expect my refund?
Once we receive your returned item, our team will inspect it within 3-5 business days. After approval, refunds to credit cards will be processed within 45 business days, according to your bank's terms and conditions.

Can sale items be returned or exchanged?
Purchases made during our "End of Season Sale" are final and cannot be returned. Items from other promotional events may be returned for a gift card, subject to our standard policy.

What should I do if my item is defective or damaged?
We are committed to the highest standards of quality. In the unlikely event you receive a faulty item, please contact our Customer Service Department immediately at customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Providing a photo of the item along with your receipt will help us resolve the matter for you swiftly.

settings.heading: Payment Details
settings.content:
What payment methods do you accept?
We accept a variety of secure payment methods to ensure a seamless checkout. Our system is designed to keep your financial details protected at all times.

Is your website secure for payments?
Absolutely. We are committed to protecting your privacy. Our website is fortified with security measures, and our "Privacy Policy" details how we safeguard your personal information.

How do I use a discount or promotional code?
To redeem a special offer, enter the promotional code in the designated field at checkout. Please log in to your account to do so, as our promotions are typically exclusive to our members.

settings.heading: Product Information
settings.content:
How do I find the right size and fit?
A flawless fit is essential. We invite you to consult our comprehensive size chart. We provide detailed measurement charts for our collections to help you select your new pieces with confidence. Simply compare your measurements to our guide to find your ideal CC Double O size.

How should I care for my items?
To maintain the quality and longevity of your CC Double O pieces, we recommend following the specific care instructions on each item's label. Proper care will ensure your garments remain timeless essentials in your wardrobe.
